data.title: Encryption Standards
data.description: Prioritizes the use of strong encryption to protect data in transit and at rest.
data.technical_spec: TLS 1.3 for data in transit, AES-256 for data at rest.

data.title: Identity and Access Management
data.description: Employs rigorous identity management to secure user accounts and data.

data.title: DDoS Protection
data.description: Implements defense mechanisms against Distributed Denial of Service attacks.
data.technical_spec: AWS Shield and AWS WAF to monitor and mitigate attacks.

data.title: Data Loss Prevention
data.description: Prevents unauthorized data access and data leakage.
data.technical_spec: AWS Macie for machine learning-based data classification and protection.

data.title: Security Compliance
data.description: Adheres to industry standards and best practices for digital security.
data.technical_spec: Compliant with ISO 27001, SOC, PCI DSS standards.
